specialties.name: Cardiologist
specialties.description: Diagnoses and treats diseases of the heart and blood vessels, including coronary artery disease, heart failure, arrhythmias, and hypertension.

specialties.name: Dermatologist
specialties.description: Specializes in conditions affecting the skin, hair, and nails, including eczema, psoriasis, acne, skin cancer, and cosmetic concerns.

specialties.name: Endocrinologist
specialties.description: Treats hormonal disorders including diabetes, thyroid diseases, metabolic disorders, and adrenal conditions.

specialties.name: Gastroenterologist
specialties.description: Specializes in the digestive system including the esophagus, stomach, intestines, liver, pancreas, and gallbladder.

specialties.name: Neurologist
specialties.description: Diagnoses and treats disorders of the nervous system including the brain, spinal cord, and peripheral nerves.

specialties.name: Orthopedist
specialties.description: Treats musculoskeletal conditions including bones, joints, ligaments, tendons, and muscles through surgical and non-surgical methods.

specialties.name: Pulmonologist
specialties.description: Specializes in diseases of the lungs and respiratory system including asthma, COPD, and pulmonary fibrosis.

specialties.name: ENT Specialist
specialties.description: Treats conditions of the ear, nose, and throat (otolaryngologist), including hearing loss, sinusitis, and voice disorders.

specialties.name: Ophthalmologist
specialties.description: Medical doctor specializing in eye and vision care, including surgery for cataracts, glaucoma, and retinal diseases.

specialties.name: Psychiatrist
specialties.description: Medical doctor specializing in mental health diagnosis and treatment, including medication management for psychiatric conditions.

specialties.name: Urologist
specialties.description: Treats diseases of the urinary system and male reproductive system, including kidney stones, incontinence, and prostate conditions.

specialties.name: Rheumatologist
specialties.description: Specializes in autoimmune and inflammatory diseases affecting joints, muscles, and the immune system.

specialties.name: Oncologist
specialties.description: Diagnoses and treats cancer through chemotherapy, immunotherapy, and coordination of comprehensive cancer care.

specialties.name: Gynecologist
specialties.description: Specializes in women's reproductive health including menstrual disorders, pregnancy, menopause, and reproductive cancers.

specialties.name: Nephrologist
specialties.description: Specializes in kidney diseases, dialysis management, and kidney transplant care.

specialties.name: Allergist/Immunologist
specialties.description: Diagnoses and treats allergies, asthma, and immune system disorders including immunodeficiencies.

specialties.name: General Practitioner
specialties.description: Provides comprehensive primary care including preventive medicine, health screenings, and initial evaluation of a wide range of conditions.

specialties.name: Pediatrician
specialties.description: Specializes in medical care for infants, children, and adolescents, including development, vaccinations, and childhood diseases.
